headline: Linde’s New €1.6 Billion Eurobond Raise Might Change The Case For Investing In Linde (LIN)
summary: In May 2026, Linde plc issued €600 million of floating rate notes due 2028, €500 million of 3.200% notes due 2030, and €500 million of 3.800% notes due 2036 under its updated €25.00 billion European debt issuance programme, raising about €1.60 billion in net proceeds for general corporate purposes. The admission of these senior unsecured notes to trading on the Luxembourg Stock Exchange’s Euro MTF market underscores Linde’s continued access to diversified euro-denominated funding as it...
